commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a scoped token-resolution helper for Overview WebSocket URL edits, updates UI regression tests, and adds a release-note entry.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +66, Docs +1. Total +84 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the Overview URL input handler clears the token whenever the edited URL differs from the previous value, matching the linked issue's reproduction steps.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the release-owned changelog edit, refresh the branch, and preserve the scoped token behavior already in the PR.

target.title: fix(ui): preserve gateway token during safe websocket url edits
target.body:
## Summary
- Fixes #41545 by preserving the Gateway Token while the user makes harmless same-normalized-endpoint WebSocket URL edits in Overview > Gateway Access.
- Clears or reloads the token when the normalized gateway endpoint changes so a gateway-scoped credential is not carried to another endpoint.
- Repairs source PR #42001 and preserves attribution for @llagy0020 / @llagy007.

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed

## Notes
Security-routed PRs #41546, #41552, and #41718 are left to central OpenClaw security handling and are not modified by this fix path.

ProjectClownfish replacement details:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156708-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/42001
- Credit: Repair source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/42001 by @llagy0020, with commit author @llagy007; preserve attribution in the PR body and branch history.; Canonical bug report: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/41545 by @wsyjh8; credit the reporter in the changelog entry if the project style allows.; Security-routed PRs #41546, #41552, and #41718 must not be modified by this repair path.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: To https://github.com/llagy0020/openclaw.git
